title: T-032 — Reference.BriefFieldMapping seed (Brief → PLD per §9.5)
prompt:
# T-032 — Reference.BriefFieldMapping seed

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §9.5
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Create Reference.BriefFieldMapping table + seed all defined Brief→FA mappings (C1-C20 explicit, C21-C37 reserved) per §9.5 mapping table.

## Implementation contract
Migration 0031 emits Reference.BriefFieldMapping(brief_col, fa_target, transform, marker, tenant_id, schema_version, PK(tenant_id, brief_col)). Seed populates the 20 explicit mappings; C21-C37 marked status='reserved' or omitted. RLS policy.

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0031_brief_field_mapping.sql [create]
- packages/db/seeds/brief-field-mapping-apex.ts [create]
- packages/db/__tests__/brief-field-mapping.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given seed runs for tenant T1, when SELECT WHERE brief_col='C1', then fa_target='fa.product_name' transform='1:1'
2. Given seed re-runs, when called twice, then row count unchanged (idempotent)
3. Given C21-C37 left out, when SELECT, then 20 rows exist with explicit C1-C20 entries

## Test strategy
- RED: 3 tests for spec mapping, idempotency, count
- Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db seed:brief-field-mapping-apex && pnpm --filter db test brief-field-mapping'

## Risk red lines
- Do not include C21-C37 placeholder labels (BL-NPD-01)
- Do not skip RLS
- Do not seed without tenant_id

pipeline_inputs.description: Reference.BriefFieldMapping table + Apex seed of 20 explicit Brief→FA mappings.
pipeline_inputs.details: DDL with composite PK + RLS. Idempotent seed for C1-C20 mappings; C21-C37 deliberately omitted per BL-NPD-01.
out_of_scope: Do not implement Convert pre-population logic (T-033)
acceptance_criteria: Given seed runs for tenant T1, when SELECT WHERE brief_col='C1', then fa_target='fa.product_name' transform='1:1'
Given seed re-runs, when called twice, then row count unchanged (idempotent)
Given C21-C37 left out, when SELECT, then exactly 20 rows exist with explicit C1-C20 entries
test_strategy: RED: 3 tests for spec mapping, idempotency, count before seed exists
Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db seed:brief-field-mapping-apex && pnpm --filter db test brief-field-mapping'
